items.title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
items.summary_short: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees

topic_refs.headline: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company

source_sections.description_zh: AI 行业中的融资轮次、收购、估值和战略动向。

source_sections.description_zh: 具有实质深度的长篇专家分析和研究解读。

source_sections.label: Research Papers
source_sections.description: Research papers and paper-trending signals tied to the current day.

items.title: Labeled Compression Schemes for Concept Classes of Finite Functions
items.summary_short: The sample compression conjecture is: Each concept class of VC dimension d has a compression scheme of size d.In this paper, for any concept class of finite functions, we present a labeled sample compression scheme of size equals to its VC dimension d.

topic_refs.headline: Labeled Compression Schemes for Concept Classes of Finite Functions

items.title_zh: 有限函数概念类的带标签压缩方案
items.summary_short_zh: 样本压缩猜想是：每个 VC 维度为 d 的概念类都存在大小为 d 的压缩方案。本文针对任意有限函数的概念类，提出了一种大小等于其 VC 维度 d 的带标签样本压缩方案。

items.title: Kirchhoff-Inspired Neural Networks for Evolving High-Order Perception
items.summary_short: Deep learning architectures are fundamentally inspired by neuroscience, particularly the structure of the brain's sensory pathways, and have achieved remarkable success in learning informative data representations.

topic_refs.headline: Kirchhoff-Inspired Neural Networks for Evolving High-Order Perception

items.title_zh: 用于演化高阶感知的 Kirchhoff 启发神经网络
items.summary_short_zh: 深度学习架构从根本上受到神经科学的启发，尤其是大脑感觉通路的结构，并在学习信息丰富的数据表示方面取得了显著成功。

items.title: Perturbation: A simple and efficient adversarial tracer for representation learning in language models
items.summary_short: Linguistic representation learning in deep neural language models (LMs) has been studied for decades, for both practical and theoretical reasons.

topic_refs.headline: Perturbation: A simple and efficient adversarial tracer for representation learning in language models

items.title_zh: Perturbation：一种用于语言模型表示学习的简单高效对抗追踪器
items.summary_short_zh: 深度神经语言模型（LMs）中的语言表示学习，出于实践和理论原因，数十年来一直受到研究。

items.title: MSA: Memory Sparse Attention for Efficient End-to-End Memory Model Scaling to 100M Tokens
items.summary_short: Long-term memory is a cornerstone of human intelligence. Enabling AI to process lifetime-scale information remains a long-standing pursuit in the field.

topic_refs.headline: MSA: Memory Sparse Attention for Efficient End-to-End Memory Model Scaling to 100M Tokens

items.title_zh: MSA：用于高效端到端记忆模型扩展至 1 亿 token 的稀疏内存注意力
items.summary_short_zh: 长期记忆是人类智能的基石。让 AI 能够处理人生尺度的信息，仍是该领域长期追求的目标。

items.title: Manifold Generalization Provably Proceeds Memorization in Diffusion Models
items.summary_short: Diffusion models often generate novel samples even when the learned score is only \emph{coarse} -- a phenomenon not accounted for by the standard view of diffusion training as density estimation.

topic_refs.headline: Manifold Generalization Provably Proceeds Memorization in Diffusion Models

items.title_zh: 流形泛化在扩散模型中可证明地先于记忆化发生
items.summary_short_zh: 即使学习到的 score 只是\emph{粗略的}，扩散模型也常常会生成新样本——这一现象无法用将扩散训练视为密度估计的标准观点来解释。

items.title: Latent Algorithmic Structure Precedes Grokking: A Mechanistic Study of ReLU MLPs on Modular Arithmetic
items.summary_short: Grokking-the phenomenon where validation accuracy of neural networks on modular addition of two integers rises long after training data has been memorized-has been characterized in previous works as producing sinusoidal input weight distributions in transformers and multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs).

topic_refs.headline: Latent Algorithmic Structure Precedes Grokking: A Mechanistic Study of ReLU MLPs on Modular Arithmetic

items.title_zh: 潜在算法结构先于 Grokking：ReLU MLP 在模运算上的机制研究
items.summary_short_zh: Grokking——指神经网络在两个整数模加任务上的验证准确率在训练数据已被记忆很久之后才上升的现象——此前研究将其描述为在 transformer 和多层感知机（MLP）中产生正弦形输入权重分布。

items.title: StateLinFormer: Stateful Training Enhancing Long-term Memory in Navigation
items.summary_short: Effective navigation intelligence relies on long-term memory to support both immediate generalization and sustained adaptation.

topic_refs.headline: StateLinFormer: Stateful Training Enhancing Long-term Memory in Navigation

items.title_zh: StateLinFormer：通过有状态训练增强导航中的长期记忆
items.summary_short_zh: 高效的导航智能依赖长期记忆，以同时支持即时泛化和持续适应。

items.title: Polynomial Speedup in Diffusion Models with the Multilevel Euler-Maruyama Method
items.summary_short: We introduce the Multilevel Euler-Maruyama (ML-EM) method compute solutions of SDEs and ODEs using a range of approximators $f^1,\dots,f^k$ to the drift $f$ with increasing accuracy and computational cost, only requiring a few evaluations of the most accurate $f^k$ and many evaluations of the less

topic_refs.headline: Polynomial Speedup in Diffusion Models with the Multilevel Euler-Maruyama Method

items.title_zh: 使用多层级 Euler-Maruyama 方法实现扩散模型的多项式加速
items.summary_short_zh: 我们提出多层级 Euler-Maruyama（ML-EM）方法，使用一组对漂移项 f 的近似器 $f^1,\dots,f^k$（其精度和计算成本递增）来计算 SDE 和 ODE 的解，只需少量评估最精确的 $f^k$，并大量评估较低精度的近似器。

items.title: MoE-Sieve: Routing-Guided LoRA for Efficient MoE Fine-Tuning
items.summary_short: Standard LoRA fine-tuning of Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models applies adapters to every expert, yet our profiling shows that per-layer expert routing is highly skewed: a small subset of experts handles most tokens in each layer, while many others are rarely activated ("cold").

topic_refs.headline: MoE-Sieve: Routing-Guided LoRA for Efficient MoE Fine-Tuning

items.title_zh: MoE-Sieve：路由引导的 LoRA，用于高效 MoE 微调
items.summary_short_zh: 标准的 Mixture-of-Experts（MoE）模型 LoRA 微调会对每个 expert 都应用适配器，但我们的分析显示，每层的 expert 路由高度偏斜：每层中只有一小部分 expert 处理了大多数 token，而许多其他 expert 很少被激活（“冷”）。

items.title: Minimal Sufficient Representations for Self-interpretable Deep Neural Networks
items.summary_short: Deep neural networks (DNNs) achieve remarkable predictive performance but remain difficult to interpret, largely due to overparameterization that obscures the minimal structure required for interpretation.

topic_refs.headline: Minimal Sufficient Representations for Self-interpretable Deep Neural Networks

items.title_zh: 用于可自解释深度神经网络的最小充分表示
items.summary_short_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）具有出色的预测性能，但仍然难以解释，这在很大程度上是由于过参数化掩盖了解释所需的最小结构。

items.title: Likelihood hacking in probabilistic program synthesis
items.summary_short: When language models are trained by reinforcement learning (RL) to write probabilistic programs, they can artificially inflate their marginal-likelihood reward by producing programs whose data distribution fails to normalise instead of fitting the data better.

topic_refs.headline: Likelihood hacking in probabilistic program synthesis

items.title_zh: 概率程序合成中的似然劫持
items.summary_short_zh: 当语言模型通过强化学习（RL）训练来编写概率程序时，它们可能通过生成数据分布无法归一化的程序，人为抬高其边际似然奖励，而不是更好地拟合数据。

items.title: Sparse Autoencoders for Interpretable Medical Image Representation Learning
items.summary_short: Vision foundation models (FMs) achieve state-of-the-art performance in medical imaging. However, they encode information in abstract latent representations that clinicians cannot interrogate or verify.

topic_refs.headline: Sparse Autoencoders for Interpretable Medical Image Representation Learning

items.title_zh: 用于可解释医学图像表示学习的稀疏自编码器
items.summary_short_zh: 视觉基础模型（FM）在医学影像中达到了最先进性能。然而，它们将信息编码在抽象的潜在表示中，临床医生无法对其进行审查或验证。

source_sections.description_zh: 与当日相关的研究论文及论文热度信号。

source_sections.label: GitHub / Tools
source_sections.description: Repositories, tooling launches, and builder momentum around practical AI systems.

items.title: larksuite/cli
items.summary_short: The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool, maintained by the larksuite team — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 19 AI Agent Skills
items.summary_short_zh: 由 larksuite 团队维护的官方 Lark/Feishu CLI 工具——为人类和 AI Agents 打造。覆盖 Messenger、Docs、Base、Sheets、Calendar、Mail、Tasks、Meetings 等核心业务领域，提供 200+ 命令和 19 项 AI Agent Skills

items.title: Arthur-Ficial/apfel
items.summary_short: Apple Intelligence from the command line. On-device LLM via FoundationModels framework. No API keys, no cloud, no dependencies
items.summary_short_zh: 命令行中的 Apple Intelligence。通过 FoundationModels 框架实现端侧 LLM。无需 API 密钥，无需云端，无依赖

items.title: RotorQuant: 10-19x faster alternative to TurboQuant via Clifford rotors (44x fewer params)
items.summary_short: RotorQuant introduces a novel approach to vector quantization by utilizing Clifford Algebra, achieving 10-19x speed improvements over TurboQuant with 44x fewer parameters.
items.title_zh: RotorQuant：通过 Clifford rotors 实现比 TurboQuant 快 10-19 倍的替代方案（参数少 44 倍）
items.summary_short_zh: RotorQuant 通过利用 Clifford Algebra 提出了一种新颖的向量量化方法，以少 44 倍参数实现了相较 TurboQuant 10-19 倍的速度提升。

source_sections.description_zh: 围绕实用 AI 系统的代码仓库、工具发布和开发者势头。

evidence.title_zh: 用于可自解释深度神经网络的最小充分表征

topics.headline_zh: 用于可自解释深度神经网络的最小充分表征
topics.summary_short_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）具有出色的预测性能，但仍然难以解释，主要原因在于过参数化掩盖了解释所需的最小结构。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: Mitigating Object Hallucinations in LVLMs via Attention Imbalance Rectification
topics.summary_short: Object hallucination in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) severely compromises their reliability in real-world applications, posing a critical barrier to their deployment in high-stakes scenarios such as autonomous driving and medical image analysis.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Mitigating Object Hallucinations in LVLMs via Attention Imbalance Rectification
evidence.title_zh: 通过校正注意力失衡缓解 LVLM 中的对象幻觉

topics.headline_zh: 通过校正注意力失衡缓解 LVLM 中的对象幻觉
topics.summary_short_zh: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）中的对象幻觉严重损害了其在现实应用中的可靠性，成为其在自动驾驶和医学图像分析等高风险场景中部署的关键障碍。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: MoE-Sieve: Routing-Guided LoRA for Efficient MoE Fine-Tuning
topics.summary_short: Standard LoRA fine-tuning of Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models applies adapters to every expert, yet our profiling shows that per-layer expert routing is highly skewed: a small subset of experts handles most tokens in each layer, while many others are rarely activated ("cold").
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: MoE-Sieve: Routing-Guided LoRA for Efficient MoE Fine-Tuning
evidence.title_zh: MoE-Sieve：用于高效 MoE 微调的路由引导 LoRA

topics.headline_zh: MoE-Sieve：用于高效 MoE 微调的路由引导 LoRA
topics.summary_short_zh: 标准的 LoRA 微调会为 Mixture-of-Experts（MoE）模型中的每个 expert 都应用适配器，但我们的分析显示，每层的 expert 路由高度偏斜：每层中只有一小部分 expert 处理了大多数 token，而许多其他 expert 很少被激活（“冷”）。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: MSA: Memory Sparse Attention for Efficient End-to-End Memory Model Scaling to 100M Tokens
topics.summary_short: Long-term memory is a cornerstone of human intelligence. Enabling AI to process lifetime-scale information remains a long-standing pursuit in the field.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: MSA: Memory Sparse Attention for Efficient End-to-End Memory Model Scaling to 100M Tokens
evidence.title_zh: MSA：用于将端到端记忆模型高效扩展到 1 亿 token 的稀疏记忆注意力

topics.headline_zh: MSA：用于将端到端记忆模型高效扩展到 1 亿 token 的稀疏记忆注意力
topics.summary_short_zh: 长期记忆是人类智能的基石。让 AI 能够处理人生尺度的信息，仍是该领域长期追求的目标。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: Perturbation: A simple and efficient adversarial tracer for representation learning in language models
topics.summary_short: Linguistic representation learning in deep neural language models (LMs) has been studied for decades, for both practical and theoretical reasons.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Perturbation: A simple and efficient adversarial tracer for representation learning in language models
evidence.title_zh: Perturbation：一种用于语言模型表征学习的简单高效对抗追踪器

topics.headline_zh: Perturbation：一种用于语言模型表征学习的简单高效对抗追踪器
topics.summary_short_zh: 出于实践和理论原因，深度神经语言模型（LMs）中的语言表征学习已被研究了数十年。

topics.headline: Polynomial Speedup in Diffusion Models with the Multilevel Euler-Maruyama Method
topics.summary_short: We introduce the Multilevel Euler-Maruyama (ML-EM) method compute solutions of SDEs and ODEs using a range of approximators $f^1,\dots,f^k$ to the drift $f$ with increasing accuracy and computational cost, only requiring a few evaluations of the most accurate $f^k$ and many evaluations of the less
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Polynomial Speedup in Diffusion Models with the Multilevel Euler-Maruyama Method
evidence.title_zh: 使用多层 Euler-Maruyama 方法在扩散模型中实现多项式加速

topics.headline_zh: 使用多层 Euler-Maruyama 方法在扩散模型中实现多项式加速
topics.summary_short_zh: 我们提出了多层 Euler-Maruyama（ML-EM）方法，使用一组对漂移项 f 的近似器 $f^1,\dots,f^k$（其精度和计算成本逐步提高）来计算 SDE 和 ODE 的解，只需少量评估最精确的 $f^k$，并对精度较低的近似器进行多次评估
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文已在 1 个独立来源中出现。

topics.headline: Resolving gradient pathology in physics-informed epidemiological models
topics.summary_short: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are increasingly used in mathematical epidemiology to bridge the gap between noisy clinical data and compartmental models, such as the susceptible-exposed-infected-removed (SEIR) model.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Resolving gradient pathology in physics-informed epidemiological models
evidence.title_zh: 解决物理信息流行病学模型中的梯度病态问题

topics.headline_zh: 解决物理信息流行病学模型中的梯度病态问题
topics.summary_short_zh: 物理信息神经网络（PINNs）正越来越多地用于数学流行病学，以弥合嘈杂临床数据与分 compartment 模型（如易感-暴露-感染-移除（SEIR）模型）之间的差距。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文已在 1 个独立来源中出现。

topics.headline: Self-Distillation for Multi-Token Prediction
topics.summary_short: As Large Language Models (LLMs) scale up, inference efficiency becomes a critical bottleneck. Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) could accelerate LLM inference by predicting multiple future tokens in parallel.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Self-Distillation for Multi-Token Prediction
evidence.title_zh: 用于多 Token 预测的自蒸馏

topics.headline_zh: 用于多 Token 预测的自蒸馏
topics.summary_short_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）规模不断扩大，推理效率成为关键瓶颈。多 Token 预测（MTP）可通过并行预测多个未来 token 来加速 LLM 推理。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文已在 1 个独立来源中出现。

topics.headline: Sparse Autoencoders for Interpretable Medical Image Representation Learning
topics.summary_short: Vision foundation models (FMs) achieve state-of-the-art performance in medical imaging. However, they encode information in abstract latent representations that clinicians cannot interrogate or verify.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Sparse Autoencoders for Interpretable Medical Image Representation Learning
evidence.title_zh: 用于可解释医学图像表征学习的稀疏自编码器

topics.headline_zh: 用于可解释医学图像表征学习的稀疏自编码器
topics.summary_short_zh: 视觉基础模型（FMs）在医学影像中实现了最先进的性能。然而，它们将信息编码在抽象的潜在表征中，临床医生无法对其进行审查或验证。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文已在 1 个独立来源中出现。

topics.headline: StateLinFormer: Stateful Training Enhancing Long-term Memory in Navigation
topics.summary_short: Effective navigation intelligence relies on long-term memory to support both immediate generalization and sustained adaptation.

x_buzz.title: RotorQuant: 10-19x faster alternative to TurboQuant via Clifford rotors (44x fewer params)
x_buzz.summary: RotorQuant: 10-19x faster alternative to TurboQuant via Clifford rotors (44x fewer params) (Activity: 652): RotorQuant introduces a novel approach to vector quantization by utilizing Clifford Algebra, achieving 10-19x speed improvements over TurboQuant with 44x fewer parameters. The method replaces the d×d random orthogonal matrix with Clifford rotors, reducing the computational complexity from 16,384 FMAs to approximately 100 FMAs for d=128 . This results in a cosine similarity of 0.990 compared to TurboQuant's...
